title: Jack Broadbent (musician)
extract: Jack Broadbent (born 15 June 1988) is a British blues rock guitarist, singer, and songwriter. He has released six albums to date, and has toured with Lynyrd Skynyrd, Peter Frampton, Ronnie Wood, Richard Thompson and Bill Payne.  The latter musician, a Little Feat founding member said about Broadbent, "I love his voice. His playing is superb, showing an almost reckless abandon when he gets revved up".
